details.name: New Point Comfort Lighthouse
details.summary: New Point Comfort Light is a lighthouse in the Virginia portion of the Chesapeake Bay, United States, off the tip of the Middle Peninsula. Finished in 1804, it is the third-oldest surviving light in the bay, and the tenth-oldest in the United States.

details.name: Musselbed Shoals Light
details.summary: The Musselbed Shoals Light was a lighthouse which once stood in Narragansett Bay at the west entrance to Mount Hope Bay, south of Bristol Point. As with many Rhode Island lights, it was a casualty of the New England Hurricane of 1938.

details.name: Hog Island Shoal Light
details.summary: Hog Island Shoal Light, built in 1901, is a sparkplug lighthouse on a shoal off of Hog Island, Rhode Island. It is located about 600 feet (180 m) southeast of the island, at the entrance to Mount Hope Bay.

details.name: Clark's Point Light
details.summary: The Clarks Point Light is located in New Bedford, Massachusetts. Originally constructed as a wooden tower, it was replaced with a stone tower in 1804.

details.name: Turtle Rock Light
details.summary: The Lighthouse on Turtle Rock is a lighthouse built in 1887 to aid traffic on the Schuylkill River near Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. The lighthouse was constructed by Frank Thurwanger at a cost of $2,663 on an area of land just west of Boathouse Row.

details.name: Feu de Marée
details.summary: Le phare du Crotoy est situé entre la rue de la Butte et la rue de la Mer, face à la rue Guerlain, sur la côte nord de la baie de Somme. Il a été allumé en 1948, le précédent, construit en 1851, ayant été détruit en 1944.

details.name: 大瀬崎灯台
details.summary: 大瀬埼灯台（おおせざきとうだい）は、五島列島福江島の西端、大瀬崎の断崖に建てられた灯台。灯台としての規模は大型であり日本屈指の光達距離を誇る。

details.name: Faru de s'ìsula de is càvurus/Faro dell'Isola dei Cavoli
details.summary: Isola dei Cavoli Lighthouse (Italian: Faro di Isola dei Cavoli) is an active lighthouse located on a small islet, 690 metres (2,260 ft) from Cape Carbonara, the southeasternmost tip of Sardinia in the municipality of Villasimius on the Tyrrhenian Sea.

details.name: Blockhouse Point Lighthouse
details.summary: The Blockhouse Point Light is a lighthouse at Rocky Point, Prince Edward Island, Canada, on the western shore of Charlottetown Harbour. The present lighthouse, constructed in 1876, replaced older lighthouses at the site which are believed to have been constructed as early as…

details.name: Ellesmere Port Lighthouse
details.summary: Ellesmere Port Dock is a dock in Britain, situated on the Manchester Ship Canal, in Ellesmere Port, Cheshire, England.

details.name: Amlwch Lighthouse
details.summary: The Amlwch Lighthouse (Grid reference: SH 452937) is a lighthouse tower situated on the outer pier of Amlwch, at the northeast tip of Anglesey, Wales. The existing lighthouse, a square tower erected in 1853, is the fourth on this site.

details.name: Burnham-on-Sea Round Tower
details.summary: The Round Tower was a lighthouse in Burnham-on-Sea, Somerset, England, established in 1801. It was decommissioned in 1832, having been replaced by a pair of leading lights half a mile to the north, and is now a private dwelling.

details.name: Windward Point Light
details.summary: Le phare de Windward Point (en espagnol : Faro de Punta Barlovento) est un phare inactif situé dans la base navale américaine de la baie de Guantánamo , sur le littoral sud de la province de Guantánamo, à Cuba.

details.name: Baker Shoal Range Rear Light
details.summary: Baker Shoal Range Rear Lighthouse is a lighthouse in Delaware, United States, on the Delaware River, near Port Penn.

details.name: Barber's Point Light
details.summary: Barber's Point Light is an inactive lighthouse on Lake Champlain in New York.

details.name: American Shoal Light
details.summary: The American Shoal Light is located east of the Saddlebunch Keys, just off Sugarloaf Key, close to Looe Key, in Florida, United States. It was completed in 1880, and first lit on July 15, 1880.

details.name: Faro Bahía Félix
details.summary: El Faro Bahía Félix es un faro perteneciente a la red de faros de Chile. Se encuentra en el sector Bahía Félix de la Isla Tamar en la Región de Magallanes.​ Este faro habitado es Monumento Histórico de la Región de Magallanes.

details.name: Faro Islote Fairway
details.summary: El Faro Islote Fairway es uno de los faros ubicados en el sector de Islotes Fairway en el Estrecho de Magallanes. Pertenece a la red de faros de Chile, entrando en servicio en 1920.​ Faro habitado.

details.name: Faro Punta Concón
details.summary: El Faro Punta Concón se ubica en la costa de Concón y forma parte de la red de faros de Chile.​ Está situado en Marina Higuerillas, un puerto recreativo de 15 kilómetros.​

details.name: Faro Punta Corona
details.summary: El Faro Punta Corona es un faro perteneciente a la Armada de Chile. Se ubica a 37 km de la localidad de Ancud en la Región de Los Lagos.​ Faro habitado.

details.name: Two Bush Island Light
details.summary: Two Bush Island Light is a lighthouse on Two Bush Island, on the channel of the same name, the southwestern entrance to Penobscot Bay, Maine, United States. The two bushes for which the island was named have long since vanished.

details.name: Georgetown Light
details.summary: Georgetown Light is an active light on North Island at the entrance to Winyah Bay southeast of Georgetown, South Carolina. The light is maintained by the U.S.

details.name: Cumberland Head Light
details.summary: Cumberland Head Light is a lighthouse on Lake Champlain's Cumberland Bay in New York state. The lighthouse was established in 1838 and the tower was first lit in 1868.

details.name: Horse Island Light

details.name: North Pierhead Light
details.summary: The Manistee Pierhead lights are a pair of active aids to navigation located on the north and south pier in the harbor of Manistee, Michigan, "Lake Michigan’s Victorian Port City."

details.name: Munising Rear Range Light
details.summary: The Munising Rear Range Light works with the Munising Front Range Light to project a line of light out into Lake Superior in order to guide boats from the open lake into the safe harbor at Munising, Michigan. This harbor is a natural bay (thus providing protection from easterly…
The Manning Memorial Light, also known as the Robert H. Manning Memorial Lighthouse or Manning Light is a lighthouse located near Empire, Michigan.

details.name: Hooper Strait Light
details.summary: Hooper Strait Light is one of four surviving Chesapeake Bay screw-pile lighthouses in the U.S. state of Maryland.

details.name: Phare de l'Île Verte
details.summary: Île-Verte Lighthouse is a lighthouse on Île Verte in Notre-Dame-des-Sept-Douleurs, Quebec, Canada. Completed in 1809, it is the oldest lighthouse on the Saint Lawrence River and the third oldest in Canada.

details.name: Chrome Island Lighthouse
details.summary: Chrome Island Lighthouse is a light station established in 1891 that assists traffic in the region of Deep Bay, British Columbia, Denman Island, and Hornby Island. It is currently a staffed station, though in recent years the Canadian Coast Guard has considered automating it.

details.name: Farol das Conchas

details.name: Dumpling Rocks Light
details.summary: Dumpling Rocks Light is a light on a skeleton tower on Dumpling Rock, Buzzards Bay, Massachusetts. It replaced the wooden Dumpling Rock Light, built 1889, which had replaced the original stone lighthouse established in 1829.

details.name: Stamford Harbor Ledge Light
details.summary: Stamford Harbor Ledge Lighthouse is a lighthouse in Connecticut, United States, on Chatham Rock off of Stamford, Connecticut. It was added to the National Register of Historic Places in 1991.

details.name: Batu Tinagat Lighthouse
details.summary: The Batu Tinagat Lighthouse (Malay: Rumah Api Batu Tinagat) is a lighthouse on Batu Tinagat of Tawau District, Tawau Division in Sabah, Malaysia. It is located approximately 10 kilometres from the Tawau town centre.

details.name: Vahemadal lighthouse
details.summary: Vahemadala tuletorn (varem Vahemadala tulepaak) on tuletorn Tallinna lahes Vahemadalal Suurest Paljassaarest 3 km loodes.

details.name: Vainupea tulepaak
details.summary: Vainupea tulepaak on tulepaak Lääne-Viru maakonnas Haljala vallas Vainupea neemel. Tulepaagi geograafilised koordinaadid on 59° 35′ 9″ N, 26° 15′ 54″ E.

details.name: Karbimadal lighthouse
details.summary: Karbimadala tuletorn (varem Karbimadala tulepaak) on tulepaak Soome lahes Karbimadalal. Tulepaagi geograafilised koordinaadid on 59° 33′ 0″ N, 24° 58′ 15″ E.

details.name: Faro de Cabo Home
details.summary: La baliza de cabo Home es una baliza situada en cabo Home, al sur de Cangas de Morrazo, en la provincia de Pontevedra, Galicia, España. Está gestionada por la Autoridad Portuaria de Vigo.​ Su linterna situada a 38 metros de altura sobre el mar, está formada de tres linternas, la…

details.name: Faro di Capo Gallo
details.summary: Capo Gallo Lighthouse (Italian: Faro di Capo Gallo) is an active lighthouse located on the northern tip of the promontory of Monte Pellegrino and marks the western entrance to the Gulf of Palermo, Sicily on the Tyrrhenian Sea.

Eborac Island Light is an active lighthouse on Eborac Island, a small rocky island in the Adolphus Channel just off Cape York, the northern tip of Cape York Peninsula, Far North Queensland, Australia. It guides ships into the coastal channel inside the Great Barrier Reef.

Whitby East Pier Lighthouse is, along with Whitby West Pier Lighthouse, one of two lighthouses protecting the entrance to the harbour of the town of Whitby in the English county of North Yorkshire. As its name suggests, it is located on the East Pier of that harbour.

details.name: Cap Caxine
details.summary: منارة رأس كاكسين هي منارة تقع على بعد حوالي 2 كم من المدخل الغربي لخليج الجزائر العاصمة.

details.name: Súgandisey
details.summary: p4 Der Leuchtturm Súgandisey steht auf dem höchsten Punkt der Basaltinsel Súgandisey, die dem Hafen von Stykkishólmur auf der Halbinsel Snæfellsnes im Westen Islands vorgelagert ist und diesen schützt. Er unterstützt die Navigation im Breiðafjörður.

details.name: Faro Punta Curaumilla
details.summary: El Faro Punta Curaumilla es un faro perteneciente a la red de faros de Chile, ubicado en la Bahía Laguna Verde de Valparaíso.

details.name: Lover's Leap
details.summary: Built by the Engineering Department of the Port Authority of Jamaica, Lover's Leap Lighthouse is Jamaica's most recent. It is a 100 feet (30 m) tall cylindrical steel(?) tower with lantern and octagonal gallery.

details.name: Far d'Alcanada
details.summary: El faro de Alcanada es un faro situado en el islote de Alcanada, en el lado norte de la bahía de Alcudia, a 5 km del puerto de Alcudia, en la isla de Mallorca, Islas Baleares, España.​

details.name: Faro Isla Quiriquina
details.summary: El Faro Isla Quiriquina es un faro perteneciente a la red de faros de Chile.

details.name: Faro Punta Lobos
details.summary: El Faro Trilco también conocido como Faro Alcatraz y Faro de Sydney´s Nao es un faro chileno ubicado en la Región del Maule. Tiene la particularidad de ser el primer faro privado de Chile.

details.name: Φάρος Καψαλίου
details.summary: Kapsálin majakka (kreik. φάρος Καψαλίου) on vuonna 1853 rakennettu majakka Välimeressä sijaitsevan ja Kreikalle kuuluvan Kytheran saaren eteläosassa.

details.name: Faro Serrano
details.summary: El Faro Serrano, también conocido como Faro Península Serrano o antiguo faro de Iquique es un faro activo ubicado en la rada de Iquique, I Región de Tarapacá, Chile.

details.name: 久六島灯台
details.summary: 久六島灯台（きゅうろくしまとうだい）は、青森県深浦町の久六島に立つ白亜の灯台。深浦町から約32kmの位置。

details.name: Capones Island Lighthouse
details.summary: Capones Island Lighthouse is a historic lighthouse located in Capones Island off the coast of Barangay Pundaquit, San Antonio, in the province of Zambales, in the Philippines. The light guides international vessels coming from the north to northwest towards Subic Bay or to…

details.name: Monument to Semyon Dezhnyov
details.summary: Памятник Семёну Дежнёву — обелиск, посвящённый русскому казаку-землепроходцу Семёну Ивановичу Дежнёву. Находится на Чукотке, на крайней восточной точке России — мысе Дежнёва.

details.name: Doubling Point Front Range Light
details.summary: The Doubling Point Range Lights are a pair of range lights on the Kennebec River, in Arrowsic, Maine. Built in 1898 as part of a major improvement on navigational aids on the river, they are the only surviving pair of range lights in the state.

details.name: Port Sanilac Light
details.summary: Port Sanilac Light is a United States Coast Guard lighthouse located on Point Sanilac, near Port Sanilac on the eastern side of Michigan's Thumb. It is an automated and active aid to navigation on Lake Huron.

details.name: Old Lighthouse
details.summary: Winterton Lighthouse is located in Winterton-on-Sea in the English county of Norfolk. In 1845 Winterton Ness was described as being 'well known to the mariner as the most fatal headland between Scotland and London'.

details.name: English Caye Light
details.summary: English Caye Light is an active lighthouse on a small island in Belize. The white lantern is mounted on a 19m high framework tower, and also has a focal plane of 19 m (62 ft).

details.name: Elbow of Cross Ledge Light
details.summary: The Elbow of Cross Ledge Light was a lighthouse on the north side of the ship channel in Delaware Bay in Cumberland County, New Jersey, on the east coast of the United States, west of Egg Island Point. It was destroyed by a ship collision in 1953 and replaced by a skeleton tower…

details.name: 博奕岬灯台
details.summary: 博奕岬（ばくちみさき）は、京都府舞鶴市瀬崎に属し、日本海（若狭湾西部）に面する岬。大浦半島の北西端にあり、舞鶴湾の湾口の東側に位置する。

details.name: Xiyu Lighthouse

details.name: Far d'Alcossebre
details.summary: El faro de Irta es un faro situado en Alcossebre, en Alcalà de Xivert, en la provincia de Castellón, Comunidad Valenciana, España. Se encuentra dentro del parque natural de la Sierra de Irta y el acceso al foro se realiza desde la playa de las Fuentes.

Punta Beppe Tuccio Lighthouse (Italian: Faro di Punta Beppe Tuccio) is an active lighthouse located on the north eastern tip of the island of Linosa which makes part of the Pelagian Islands in the Channel of Sicily.

Cozzo Spadaro Lighthouse (Italian: Faro di Cozzo Spadaro) is an active lighthouse located at the top of a hill in the Quartiere named Cozzo Spadaro in the municipality of Portopalo di Capo Passero, the southernmost comune of Sicily, on the Ionian Sea.

details.name: Phare d'Alistro
details.summary: Le phare d'Alistro est bâti sur la commune de San-Giuliano (Haute-Corse), au nord de la pointe d'Aléria, proche d'Alistro. Il est à 50 m du sémaphore d'Alistro.

details.name: Långhällsudde

Die Leuchttürme Peterhof sind zwei Richtfeuerlinien mit drei Feuerträgern. Alle liegen in den Parkanlagen von Schloss Peterhof bei Sankt Petersburg, Russland.

details.name: Faro Miramar
details.summary: El faro Miramar es un faro antiguamente ubicado en la intersección de la avenida Costanera y la calle 25 de la ciudad argentina de Miramar, en la provincia de Buenos Aires. Actualmente se encuentra sobre el edificio Playa Club de dicha ciudad.

details.name: Ghazaouet Lighthouse
details.summary: Le phare de Ghazaouet un phare de jalonnement d'aide à la navigation dans les eaux de l'extrême ouest algérien. Il est situé à Ghazaouet dans la wilaya de Tlemcen en Algérie.

p4 Der Leuchtturm Cape Sierra (englisch Cape Sierra Lighthouse), auch Aberdeen Lighthouse, selten Cape Light House, ist ein ehemaliger Leuchtturm in Freetown im westafrikanischen Sierra Leone. Der Leuchtturm befindet sich im äußersten Nordwesten der Freetown Peninsula.

details.name: Cleft of the Rock Light
details.summary: Cleft of the Rock Light is a privately owned lighthouse located on the Pacific coast of the U.S. state of Oregon, 1.8 miles (2.9 km) south of Yachats on Cape Perpetua.

details.name: Pelican Bay Light
details.summary: The Pelican Bay Light (or Port of Brookings Light) is a small, privately owned lighthouse in Brookings, Oregon, United States. It overlooks the Port of Brookings Harbor and the mouth of the Chetco River.

details.name: Faro Morro Niebla
details.summary: El Faro Morro Niebla, también conocido como Faro Niebla y Faro Fuerte Niebla es un faro perteneciente a la red de faros de Chile.​ Se ubica en dependencias del Castillo de Niebla, en la Región de Los Ríos.

details.name: Faro Año Nuevo
details.summary: El Faro Año Nuevo es un faro de Argentina que se encuentra en la isla Observatorio, la cual forma parte del archipiélago de Año Nuevo, en el departamento Ushuaia, perteneciente a la provincia de Tierra del Fuego, Antártida e Islas del Atlántico Sur.

details.name: Cap de l'Aiguille Lighthouse
details.summary: Le phare du cap de l'Aiguille est un phare de jalonnement situé à l'extrémité nord-est de la baie d'Oran.

Georges Island Lighthouse is a prominent concrete lighthouse, built in 1917 on Georges Island in Nova Scotia, replacing an earlier tower built in 1876. The light-keeper's house remains standing a few hundred feet to the north.

details.name: Bubendey-Ufer Oberfeuer
details.summary: Der Leuchtturm Oberfeuer Bubendey-Ufer bildet zusammen mit dem Leuchtturm Unterfeuer Bubendey-Ufer die Richtfeuerlinie Bubendey-Ufer für elbaufwärts fahrende Schiffe im Hamburger Stadtteil Waltershof. Der Turm ist rot-weiß gestreift und hat ein rotes Laternenhaus.

details.name: Faro Capo San Marco
details.summary: Capo San Marco Lighthouse (Italian: Faro di Capo San Marco) is an active lighthouse located on Capo San Marco promontory, on the tip of Sinis peninsula overlooking the ruins below of Tharros. The structure is in the municipality of Cabras, in the west of the island on the Sea of…

Wolf Trap Light is a caisson lighthouse in the Virginia portion of the Chesapeake Bay, about seven and a half miles northeast of New Point Comfort Light. It is listed on the National Register of Historic Places.

details.name: Batag Lighthouse

details.name: Nootka Lighthouse

details.summary: This is a list of lighthouses in the province of British Columbia, Canada.

details.name: Phare de la pointe Colombi

details.summary: Scoglio Palumbo Lighthouse (Italian: Faro di Scoglio Palumbo) is an active lighthouse located on an islet 102 metres (335 ft) long and 67 metres (220 ft) wide just 0.6 nautical miles (1.1 km; 0.69 mi) west of the entrance to the port of Trapani on the Sicily Channel.

details.name: Punta Higüero Lighthouse
details.summary: Punta Higüero Light (Spanish: Faro de Punta Higüero) is a historic lighthouse located in the municipality of Rincón on the westernmost point, known as Punta Higüero, in the main island of Puerto Rico. The original building was built in 1892 by the Spanish government and was…

details.name: Gäveskär
details.summary: Gäveskär ist eine kleine zu Schweden gehörende Insel im Kattegat. Sie liegt im Göteborger Schärengarten westlich von Göteborg in der Provinz Västra Götalands län und gehört zur Gemeinde Göteborg.

details.name: Faro Punta Angamos
details.summary: El Faro Punta Angamos es un faro perteneciente a la red de faros de Chile.

details.name: Manakkodam Lighthouse
details.summary: Manakkodam Lighthouse is situated next to the Andhakaranazhy beach in the Alappuzha district of Kerala near Cherthala. The tower is a 33.8 metres (110.9 ft) high concrete structure with square cross section.

details.name: Craighill Channel Lower Range Rear Light
details.wikipedia: en:Craighill Channel Lower Range Rear Light
details.summary: The Craighill Channel Lower Range Rear Light is one of a pair of range lights that marks the first section of the shipping channel into Baltimore harbor. It is the tallest lighthouse in Maryland.

details.name: Love Point Light
details.summary: Love Point Light was a screw-pile lighthouse in the Chesapeake Bay, off the northern end of Kent Island, Maryland.

details.name: Ragged Point Light
details.summary: The Ragged Point Light was a screw-pile lighthouse located in the Potomac River. It was the last lighthouse built in Maryland waters and the last built at a location in the Chesapeake Bay.

details.name: Sharkfin Shoal Light
details.summary: The Sharkfin Shoal Light was a screw-pile lighthouse located at the mouth of the Nanticoke River in Chesapeake Bay, US.

details.name: Enebågsudde
details.summary: Punta ang Enebågsudde sa Sweden. Nahimutang ni sa lalawigan sa Västra Götalands län, sa habagatang bahin sa nasod, 230 km sa kasadpan sa Estokolmo ang ulohan sa nasod.

details.name: Keweenaw Waterway Upper Entrance Light
details.summary: The Keweenaw Waterway Upper Entrance Light is a lighthouse located at the north end of the Portage River in McLain State Park in Hancock Township, Michigan. It was listed on the National Register of Historic Places in 2014.

details.name: Oyster Rock Lighthouse
details.summary: The Oyster Rock Lighthouse is located in Karwar, Karnataka, India, on one of the islands located close to Karwar, Oyster Rock. Tourists can reach this island with the help of motor boats, which are available from Karwar Port.

details.name: Umpqua River Light
details.summary: The Umpqua River Light is a lighthouse on the Oregon Coast of the United States, located at the mouth of the Umpqua River on Winchester Bay, in Douglas County, Oregon.

details.name: New Presque Isle Light
details.summary: The New Presque Isle Light was built in 1870, at Presque Isle, Michigan, east of Grand Lake, and sits on the namesake peninsula. It is one of 149 lighthouses in Michigan, more than any other state.

details.name: Molenturm
details.summary: p4 Das Molenfeuer Überseehafen Süd (verniedlichend „Mäuseturm“ genannt) ist ein kleiner Leuchtturm im Hafengebiet der Stadt Bremen. Er steht auf der Abschlussmole der Überseestadt am Wendebecken der Ausfahrt des Holz- und Fabrikenhafens, des Getreide- sowie des Kranhafens.

details.name: Cap Carbon

details.name: Svjetionik Trstenik

details.name: Scarborough Lighthouse
details.summary: Scarborough Pier Lighthouse is an active aid to navigation on Vincent Pier in Scarborough, North Yorkshire, owned and operated by North Yorkshire Council. The lighthouse dates from 1806, but it had to be rebuilt following damage sustained in the German bombardment of 1914.

details.name: Vuurtoren Nieuwpoort
details.summary: De Vuurtoren van Nieuwpoort bevindt zich in de Belgische stad Nieuwpoort op de rechteroever van de IJzermonding.

details.summary: The South Pass Light, also known as the Port Eads Lighthouse South Point Light, or Gordon's Island Light, are a pair of lighthouses located on Gordon's Island at South Pass, in Plaquemines Parish, Louisiana (USA), one of the primary entrances to the Mississippi River Delta from…

details.name: Craighill Channel Lower Range Front Light

details.summary: The Craighill Channel Lower Range Front Light, named for William Price Craighill, was the first caisson lighthouse built in the Chesapeake Bay in Maryland, USA. First lit in 1873, the range marks the first leg of the maintained Craighill Channel from the Chesapeake Bay at the…
El faro de Valencia (2015) es un faro situado en el puerto de la ciudad de Valencia (Comunidad Valenciana, España).

details.name: Plymouth Light
details.summary: Plymouth Light, also known as Gurnet Light, is a historic lighthouse located on Gurnet Point at the entrance to Plymouth Bay in the town of Plymouth, Massachusetts. The light is accessible only by passing through the town of Duxbury, which lies to the north.

details.name: Cape Bruny Lighthouse
details.summary: The Cape Bruny Lighthouse is an inactive lighthouse located at the southern tip of Bruny Island, Tasmania, Australia.

details.name: Kiama Lighthouse
details.summary: Kiama Light, also known as Kiama Harbour Light, is an active lighthouse in Kiama, New South Wales, Australia. The lighthouse is located close to the Kiama Blowhole on Blowhole Point, south of Kiama Harbour.

details.name: Eastern Point Light
details.summary: Eastern Point Light is a historic lighthouse on Cape Ann, in northeastern Massachusetts. It is known as the oldest seaport in America.

details.name: Malarhorn
details.summary: Le phare de Malarhorn est un phare situé à Drangsnes dans la région des Vestfirðir.

details.name: Lauis Ledge Lighthouse
details.summary: Kagaangan ang Lauis Ledge sa Pilipinas. Nahimutang ni sa lalawigan sa Cebu City ug rehiyon sa Central Visayas, sa habagatan-sidlakang bahin sa nasod, 600 km sa habagatan-sidlakan sa Dakbayan sa Manila ang ulohan sa nasod.

details.name: Grīntāla bāka
details.summary: Der Leuchtturm Vitrupe (lettisch Grīntāla bāka oder Vitrupes bāka) steht am rechten Ufer der Vitrupe (deutsch Wettersbach) nahe der Mündung in den Rigaer Meerbusen und neben der Autobahn A1 in der Gemeinde Salacgrīva. Der Leuchtturm ist ein Metall-Gitterturm mit schwarz-weißer…

details.name: Sīkragciema bāka
details.summary: Der Leuchtturm Sīkrags, lettisch Sīkragciema bāka, befindet sich am westlichen Rand des Dorfes Sīkrags in der Gemeinde Kolka an der Irbenstraße. Eine Navigationshilfe existierte hier seit 1925.

details.name: West Pierhead Light
details.summary: Oswego Harbor West Pierhead Lighthouse is an active aid to navigation located off the coast of Oswego, New York. It was built in 1934 to replace an earlier light constructed in 1880.

details.name: Sea Girt Light
details.summary: The Sea Girt Light is a decommissioned lighthouse marking the inlet leading to the Wreck Pond in Sea Girt, New Jersey, United States. It is located on a stretch of the New Jersey shore between the Barnegat and Navesink lighthouses.

details.name: Геленджикский маяк
details.summary: Геленджикский маяк — маяк, расположенный на мысе Толстый Геленджикской бухты (Краснодарский край, Россия), на берегу Чёрного моря.

details.name: Створный маяк
details.summary: Створный маяк Геленджика — маяк, расположенный в Геленджике (Краснодарский край, Россия), на берегу Чёрного моря.

details.name: Skelligs Lighthouse
details.summary: Le phare de Skellig Michael est un phare d'Irlande situé sur l'île de Skellig Michael dans le comté de Kerry. Il est géré par les Commissioners of Irish Lights.

details.name: Port Hueneme Light
details.summary: Point Hueneme Lighthouse is a lighthouse on the southeast entrance to the Santa Barbara Channel, in Ventura County, California

details.name: Eatons Neck Light
details.summary: Eatons Neck Light has served as a navigational aid since its construction in 1798. Designed by John McComb, Jr..

details.name: Bloody Point Light
details.summary: Bloody Point Bar Light is an early sparkplug lighthouse in the Chesapeake Bay near Kent Island, Maryland.

details.name: Duluth South Breakwater Outer Light
details.summary: The Duluth South Breakwater Outer Light is a lighthouse on the south breakwater of the Duluth Ship Canal in Duluth, Minnesota, United States. It forms a range with the Duluth South Breakwater Inner Light to guide ships into the canal from Lake Superior.

details.name: Sherwood Point Lighthouse
details.summary: The Sherwood Point lighthouse is a lighthouse located near Idlewild in Door County, Wisconsin, United States. Situated on the west side of the north entrance to Sturgeon Bay, it was listed in the National Register of Historic Places in 1984.

details.name: Craighill Channel Upper Range Front Light
details.wikipedia: en:Craighill Channel Upper Range Front Light
details.summary: The Craighill Channel Upper Range Front Light is one of a pair of range lights that marks the second section of the shipping channel into Baltimore harbor.

details.name: Great Shoals Light
details.summary: Great Shoals Light was a screw-pile lighthouse in the Chesapeake Bay at the mouth of the Wicomico River.

details.name: Ontonagon Lighthouse
details.summary: The Ontonagon Light is a lighthouse located off M-64 near Ontonagon, Michigan. It was listed on the National Register of Historic Places in 1975 and designated a Michigan State Historic Site in 1973.

details.name: North Manitou Shoal Light Station
details.summary: The North Manitou Shoal Light, also known as the North Manitou Light or, locally, The Crib, is a lighthouse located in Lake Michigan, southeast of North Manitou Island in Leland Township, Michigan. When it was automated in 1980, it was the last manned offshore light in the Great…

details.name: St. George Reef Light
details.summary: The St. George Reef Light is an inactive lighthouse built on North West Seal Rock, six miles (10 km) off the coast of northern California near Crescent City.

details.name: Nash Island Light
details.summary: Nash Island Light is a lighthouse on Nash Island at the entrance to Pleasant Bay in Maine.

details.name: Wisconsin Point Lighthouse
details.summary: The Wisconsin Point Light is a lighthouse located in Superior, on Wisconsin Point, in Douglas County, Wisconsin, United States. The light and attached fog horn building sits within a 10-mile (16 km) long sand bar – stretching between the ports of Duluth and Superior.

details.summary: Franklin Island Light is a lighthouse on Franklin Island, in Muscongus Bay, Maine, USA. It was first established in 1805.

details.name: Pond Island Light
details.summary: Pond Island Light is a lighthouse at the mouth of the Kennebec River, Maine. It was first established in 1821 on Pond Island (one of several in Maine) at the mouth of the Kennebec.

details.name: Frankfort North Breakwater Light
details.summary: The Frankfort Light is a lighthouse located on the north breakwater in the harbor in Frankfort, Michigan. The current light was constructed in 1912 and placed on the National Register of Historic Places in 2005.

details.name: Charlevoix South Pier Light
details.summary: The Charlevoix South Pier Light Station is located on Lake Michigan at the entrance to Lake Charlevoix in Charlevoix County in the U.S. state of Michigan at the end of the south pier/breakwater of the channel leading to Round Lake in the city of Charlevoix.

details.name: Brough of Birsay Lighthouse
details.summary: The unmanned Brough of Birsay Lighthouse lighthouse was built in 1925 by David A Stevenson. It is located on the Brough of Birsay, an uninhabited tidal island off the northwest coast of Mainland in Orkney, Scotland, in the parish of Birsay.

details.name: Lanyu Lighthouse
details.summary: The Lanyu Lighthouse (traditional Chinese: 蘭嶼燈塔; simplified Chinese: 兰屿灯塔; pinyin: Lányǔ Dēngtǎ) is a lighthouse in Orchid Island, Taitung County, Taiwan.

details.name: Bete Grise (Mendota) Lighthouse
details.summary: The Mendota Light, also known as the Bete Grise light, was built on the Keweenaw Peninsula of Michigan to facilitate travel between Lake Superior and Lac La Belle (an artificial canal having been made to connect the two).

details.name: Faro di Fortino Tenaglia
details.summary: Fortino Tenaglia Lighthouse (Italian: Faro di Fortino Tenaglia) is an active lighthouse located on a promontory on the west side of the Gulf of Pozzuoli in the municipality of Bacoli, Campania on the Tyrrhenian Sea.

details.name: Phare de la Giraglia
details.summary: Le phare de la Giraglia est situé sur l'île de la Giraglia, à deux kilomètres au nord du petit port de pêche de Barcaggio, sur la commune d'Ersa en Haute-Corse. Le phare fait l’objet d’un classement au titre des monuments historiques depuis le 19 avril 2011.

details.name: Faro della Diga Curvilinea
details.summary: Il faro della Diga Curvilinea è un faro marittimo situato a Livorno, all'estremità meridionale della diga che fronteggia l'imboccatura sud del porto labronico. È caratterizzato da un fanale a luce rotante, alimentato mediante pannelli fotovoltaici e posto alla sommità di una…

details.name: Elbow of Cross Ledge Lighthouse
details.summary: The Elbow of Cross Ledge Light was a lighthouse on the north side of the ship channel in Delaware Bay in Cumberland County, New Jersey, on the east coast of the United States, west of Egg Island Point. It was destroyed by a ship collision in 1953 and replaced by a skeleton tower…

details.name: Brandywine Shoal Light
details.summary: The Brandywine Shoal Light is a lighthouse on the north side of the ship channel in Delaware Bay on the east coast of the United States, west of Cape May, Cape May County, New Jersey, United States. It was the site of the first screw-pile lighthouse in the United States.

details.name: Rinkenæs Fyr
details.summary: p4 Rinkenæs Fyr oder Leuchtturm Rinkenis ist ein kleiner Leuchtturm (dänisch Fyr) bei Rinkenæs auf der dänischen Seite der Flensburger Förde.

details.name: Kewaunee Pierhead Light
details.summary: The Kewaunee Pierhead lighthouse is a lighthouse located near Kewaunee in Kewaunee County, Wisconsin. The lighthouse looks nearly identical to the Holland Harbor Lighthouse, except that it is colored white.

details.name: Dyce Head Light
details.summary: Dyce Head Light is a lighthouse located at the southernmost point of the Castine peninsula in Hancock County, Maine. Built in 1829 to guide vessels along the Penobscot River and into Castine Harbor, the lighthouse served the region's flourishing shipbuilding and lumber trade…

details.name: Lighthouse of al-Mawqada
details.summary: The Ruins of Mujada or the Lighthouse of al-Mawqada (Arabic: المنارة الموقدة) is a historic ruin located to the west of the city of Karbala, Iraq. The ruins sit in the middle of the desert, and around 40 km (25 miles) away from the city.

details.name: North Head Lighthouse
details.summary: The first North Head Lighthouse on the northern side of the Saldanha Bay entrance, in South Africa, was a 300mm AGA acetylene gas lantern mounted on a square concrete pillar, installed on December 7, 1939. It had a small diaphone fog signal.

details.name: Bradleys Head Lighthouse
details.summary: The Bradleys Head Light is an active heritage-listed lighthouse at Bradleys Head, a headland protruding from the north shore of Sydney Harbour in the suburb of Mosman, New South Wales, Australia. It is the sibling of Robertson Point Light.

details.name: Barrenjoey Lighthouse
details.summary: The Barrenjoey Head Lighthouse is a heritage-listed lighthouse at Barrenjoey Headland in the Sydney suburb of Palm Beach, New South Wales, Australia. It was designed by James Barnet, the New South Wales Colonial Architect and built by Isaac Banks.

details.name: Diamond Head Lighthouse
details.summary: Diamond Head Lighthouse is a United States Coast Guard facility located on Diamond Head in Honolulu, on the island of Oʻahu in the State of Hawaiʻi. The lighthouse was listed on the National Register of Historic Places in 1980, and was featured on a United States postage stamp…

details.name: Far de la Punta de l'Avançada
details.wikipedia: es:Faro de Punta de la Avanzada
details.summary: El faro de Punta de la Avanzada es un faro situado sobre la punta de la Avanzada, un promontorio a unos 2 kilómetros del puerto de Pollensa, al norte de la isla de Mallorca, en el archipiélago de las Islas Baleares, España. Está gestionado por la autoridad portuaria de las Islas…

details.name: Point Lookout Light
details.summary: Point Lookout Light is a lighthouse that marks the entrance to the Potomac River at the southernmost tip of Maryland's western shore of the Chesapeake Bay, south of the town of Scotland in Saint Mary's County, Maryland, USA. The lighthouse is located in Point Lookout State Park.

details.name: Svjetionik Oštri Rat
details.summary: Svjetionik Oštri rat je svjetionik sjeverno od ulaza u luku Zadar.

details.name: Faro della Maddalenetta
details.summary: Isolotto della Maddalena Lighthouse (Italian: Faro di Isolotto della Maddalena) is an active lighthouse located on a small islet, 84 metres (276 ft) long, placed 800 metres (2,600 ft) north of the south mole of the Port of Alghero on the Sea of Sardinia.

details.name: Faro di Goro
details.summary: Porto di Po di Goro Lighthouse (Italian: Faro di Porto di Po di Goro) is an active lighthouse located on the Isola dell'Amore on the Adriatic Sea, the northernmost place in Emilia-Romagna to the border with Veneto, on the delta of Po river.

details.name: Svjetionik Otočić Grujica
details.summary: Le phare de Grujica (en croate : Svjetionik Otočić Grujica) est un feu actif situé sur l'îlot Grujica proche de l'île Lošinj dans le Comitat de Zadar en Croatie. Le phare est exploité par la société d'État Plovput .

details.name: Faro di Punta Polveraia
details.summary: Il faro di Punta Polveraia è un faro marittimo del canale di Corsica che si trova sull'omonimo promontorio all'estremità occidentale dell'isola d'Elba, presso l'abitato di Patresi nel territorio comunale di Marciana. Ad alimentazione elettrica e ad ottica fissa, la luce è…

details.name: Harbor Beach Light
details.summary: The Harbor Beach Lighthouse is a "sparkplug lighthouse" located at the end of the north breakwall entrance to the harbor of refuge on Lake Huron. The breakwall and light were created by the United States Army Corps of Engineers to protect the harbor of Harbor Beach, Michigan…

details.name: Port Austin Reef Light
details.summary: Port Austin Lighthouse (or Port Austin Reef Light) is a lighthouse off the shore of Lake Huron, about 2.5 miles (4.0 km) north of Port Austin, Huron County Michigan sitting on a rocky reef (shoal), which is just north of the tip of the Thumb and a real hazard to navigation.

details.name: Menominee North Pier Lighthouse
details.summary: The Menominee North Pier lighthouse is located in the harbor of Menominee, Michigan. The station was first lit in 1877.

details.name: Rangitoto Lighthouse
details.summary: Rangitoto Lighthouse (also called Rangitoto Beacon) is a lighthouse off the coast in McKenzie Bay, in Auckland's Hauraki Gulf.

details.name: Sprogø Fyr
details.summary: Sprogø Fyr er et anduvningsfyr fra 1868 på Sprogø i Storebælt. Det 19 m høje tårn står øverst på en 25 m høj bakke og er opført ovenpå de fredede ruiner af et borganlæg, opført af Valdemar den Store.

details.name: Turn Point Lighthouse
details.summary: The Turn Point Light Station is an active aid to navigation overlooking Haro Strait from the western tip of Stuart Island, San Juan County, Washington, in the northwest of the United States. The light marks a sharp turn in the shipping lanes at the transition between Haro Strait…

details.name: West Breakwater Light
details.summary: The Fairport Harbor West Breakwater Light is a lighthouse on Lake Erie located at the end of a breakwater near the mouth of the Grand River in the U.S. state of Ohio.

details.name: Long Eddy Point Light
details.summary: The Long Eddy Point Lighthouse (also known as The Whistle) is a Canadian lighthouse on Grand Manan Island in the Bay of Fundy. The navigation station was first established in 1874 as a fog alarm only and operated as such until 1966, when the present structure was built…

details.name: Boulder Bank Lighthouse
details.summary: Boulder Bank Lighthouse is a decommissioned 19th century lighthouse located near the Port Nelson end of the Boulder Bank. It was New Zealand's second permanent lighthouse.

details.name: Destruction Island Lighthouse
details.summary: Destruction Island Lighthouse is a decommissioned lighthouse on Destruction Island, a rocky island that is part of the Quillayute Needles National Wildlife Refuge lying about 3 miles (4.8 km) off the coast of Jefferson County, Washington, in the northwest of the United States.

details.name: Φάρος Ταινάρου Κάβο Ματαπά
details.summary: Der Leuchtturm am Kap Tenaro (griechisch Φάρος που βρίσκεται στο Ακρωτήριο Ταίναρο auch Akra Tainaron) steht auf der Landzungenspitze der Mani, dem Mittelfinger der griechischen Peloponnes am Kap Tenaro (auch: Kap Tainaro oder Kap Matapan) zwischen dem Lakonischen und dem…

details.name: High Lighthouse
details.summary: Harwich High and Low Lighthouses are a pair of early 19th-century towers in Harwich, Essex, which were built as leading lights to help guide vessels into the harbour. They replaced an earlier pair of lights established in the seventeenth century when Harwich was a key…

details.name: Faro de Mera
details.summary: O faro de Mera é un faro de enfilación composto de dúas torres de cor vermella na súa vista anterior e branca na posterior.

details.name: Southwest Reef Light
details.summary: Southwest Reef Light is a historic lighthouse built in 1856 at the end of Southwest Reef in Atchafalaya Bay, Louisiana to replace lightships which had been stationed there for ten years. It served to guide vessels around the reef and into the main channel of the Atchafalaya…

details.name: Middle Island Light
details.summary: The Middle Island Light is a lighthouse located on Middle Island in Lake Huron, about 10 miles (16 km) north of Alpena, Michigan. It was listed on the National Register of Historic Places in 2006.

details.name: Isle Ornsay Lighthouse
details.summary: Le phare d'Ornsay est un phare qui se situe sur la petite île d'Ornsay (en gaélique écossais : Eilean Larmain) (Hébrides intérieures), dans le comté des Highland à l'ouest de l'Écosse. Ce phare est géré par le Northern Lighthouse Board (NLB) à Édimbourg,l'organisation de l'aide…

details.name: Φάρος Κόγχη
details.summary: p4 Der Leuchtturm Akra Konchi (griechisch Φάρος Κόγχη Σαλαμίνας; auch Akra Kochi, Kap Konchi) steht auf der Halbinsel Konchi bei Peristeria im Südosten der Insel Salamis. Die Station besteht aus einem quadratischen, einstöckigen Gebäude von etwa 6,50 m Seitenlänge.

details.name: Spignon
details.summary: Spignon è un faro da tempo inattivo sull'omonima isola (160 m²) della Laguna Veneta; per questo motivo l'isola è spesso indicata anche come ex faro Spignon.

details.name: Faro de Punta Doncella
details.summary: El faro de Punta Doncella es un faro de tráfico aéreo marítimo. Está situado en Punta Doncella, entre el paseo marítimo y el puerto marítimo de Estepona, provincia de Málaga, España.

The Old Higher Lighthouse is a disused 19th century lighthouse on the Isle of Portland, Dorset, southern England. It is located at Branscombe Hill on the west side of Portland, overlooking Portland Bill.

details.name: Svjetionik Velika Murvica
details.summary: Svjetionik Otočić Murvica je svjetionik na otočiću Murvica, na zapadnom kraju Drveničkog kanala. Svjetionik je izgrađen 1896.

details.name: Senoko zuloa
details.summary: Senekozuluako itsasargia edo Senokozuloko itsasargia Pasaian dagoen itsasargia da, Pasaiako portuan dagoen izen bereko lurmuturrean eta Gurutzeko punten artean kokaturikoa. 1906an eraikia, aurrean duen Platako itsasargiarekin batera portuaren sarrera zaintzen du.

details.name: Faro de Suances
details.wikipedia: es:Faro de Punta del Torco de Afuera
details.summary: El faro de Punta del Torco de Afuera o faro de Suances se encuentra ubicado en la villa cántabra de Suances (España), junto a la desembocadura de la ría de San Martín de la Arena.

details.name: La Farola de Málaga
details.summary: La Farola es un faro situado en la ciudad española de Málaga, en la comunidad autónoma de Andalucía. Obra del ingeniero Joaquín María Pery y Guzmán, su construcción comenzó en 1813 y finalizó en 1817, estando entonces situado en la entrada del Puerto de Málaga.

details.name: Phare du Cap Lévi
details.summary: Le phare du cap Lévi est situé sur le territoire de Fermanville, dans le département de la Manche, en région Normandie. Le cap Lévi ferme à l'est la rade de Cherbourg et est prolongé en mer par les hauts-fonds de Biéroc où se forment de puissants courants, le raz du cap Lévi.

details.name: Far de Canet
details.summary: El faro de Cabo Canet es una señal luminosa de Ayuda a la Navegación marítima (AtoN) situada en la localidad de Canet de Berenguer, en la provincia de Valencia, España, en la desembocadura del río Palancia. Se encuentra a 300 metros de la orilla del mar, antiguamente rodeado de…

details.name: Svjetionik Rt Ražanj
details.summary: Svjetionik Rt Ražanj je svjetionik na rtu Ražanj, zapadnom rtu otoka Brača, na južnom ulazu u Splitska vrata. Svjetionik je značajna je orijentacijska točka za plovidbu kroz Splitska vrata i hvarski kanal.

details.name: Svjetionik Sućuraj
details.summary: Svjetionik Rt Sućuraj je svjetionik na istočnom rtu otoka Hvara. Na ovom mjestu već 1874.

details.name: Eagle Harbor Light
details.summary: Eagle Harbor Light is an operational lighthouse at Eagle Harbor, in Keweenaw County in the state of Michigan. It sits on the rocky entrance to Eagle Harbor and is one of several light stations that guide mariners on Lake Superior across the northern edge of the Keweenaw…

details.name: Sand Hills Lighthouse
details.summary: Sand Hills was an active lighthouse on the shore of Lake Superior is on private property and is currently closed to the public. It is located in Ahmeek in Keweenaw County in the Keweenaw Peninsula, which is the northern part of the Upper Peninsula in Michigan.

details.name: Neuer Leuchtturm
details.summary: Der Neue Leuchtturm Wangerooge ist ein kombinierter Leucht- und Radarturm auf der Insel Wangerooge. Er dient der Seeschifffahrt als See-, Leit- und Warnfeuer bei der Ansteuerung von Außenjade und Außenweser sowie der Verkehrssicherung in diesem Bereich.

details.name: Fort Washington Light
details.summary: Fort Washington Light is a lighthouse located on the banks of the Potomac River on the grounds of its namesake fort. There has been a lighthouse on the location since 1857; the current light was converted from a fog bell tower in 1901.

details.name: Svjetionik Rt Stončica
details.summary: Svjetionik Rt Stončica je svjetionik na sjeveroistočnom rtu otoka Visa, prema Hvarskom kanalu. Sagrađen je 1865.

details.name: Svjetionik Hrid Mulo
details.summary: Svjetionik Hrid Mulo je svjetionik na hridi Mulo, jugozapadno od Rogoznice. Sagrađen je 1873.

details.name: Phare de Port-Navalo
details.summary: Le phare de Port-Navalo est un phare situé sur la presqu'île de Rhuys, à Port-Navalo, sur la commune d'Arzon. Érigé face à la pointe de Kerpenhir sur la commune de Locmariaquer, le phare marque l'entrée du golfe du Morbihan depuis Mor braz.

details.name: Svjetionik Hridi Grebeni
details.summary: Svjetionik Hridi Grebeni je svjetionik na vrhu najveće hridi u skupini hridi Grebeni, na istočnoj strani ulaza Velika vrata, zapadno od luke Dubrovnik.

details.name: Svjetionik Rt Zub
details.summary: Svjetionik Rt Zub je svjetionik na poluotoku Lanterna, na zapadnoj obali poluotoka Istre. Udaljen je 13 km od Poreča i isto toliko od Novigrada.

details.name: Svjetionik Palagruža
details.summary: Svjetionik Otočić Palagruža je svjetionik na vrhu otočića Vela Palagruža, na sredini Jadranskog mora, između talijanske i hrvatske obale.

details.name: Phare de Penlan
details.summary: Le phare de Penlan, maison-phare, est situé à l'embouchure de la Vilaine, dans le sud du Morbihan, sur la commune de Billiers (pointe de Pen Lan). Il est automatisé et télécontrôlé depuis le phare de Goulphar à Belle-Île-en-Mer.

details.name: Faro di Capo Murro di Porco
details.summary: Capo Murro di Porco Lighthouse (Italian: Faro di Capo Murro di Porco) is an active lighthouse located at the end of the Maddalena Peninsula on the south eastern tip of Sicily in the Area marina protetta Plemmirio, municipality of Siracusa on the Ionian Sea.

details.name: Seven Foot Knoll Lighthouse
details.summary: The Seven Foot Knoll Light was built in 1855 (according to some sources, 1856) and is the oldest screw-pile lighthouse in Maryland. It was located atop Seven Foot Knoll in the Chesapeake Bay until it was replaced by a modern navigational aid and relocated to Baltimore's Inner…

details.name: Faro della Vittoria
details.summary: Il Faro della Vittoria, anche noto come Faro della Maddalena, è un monumento colossale dedicato alla Vittoria Alata, posto sulla sommità del parco della Rimembranza presso il Colle della Maddalena. L'ottica del faro è alloggiata nella fiaccola sorretta tra le mani dell'imponente…

details.name: Darßer Ort
details.summary: Der Leuchtturm Darßer Ort ist ein Seefeuer an der Ostsee in Mecklenburg-Vorpommern. Er steht am Darßer Ort, der nordwestlichen Spitze der Halbinsel Fischland-Darß-Zingst.

details.name: Svjetionik Sušac
details.summary: Svjetionik Otok Sušac je svjetionik na vrhu otočića Sušca, na sredini Jadranskog mora, istočno od otoka Lastova. Svjetionik je sagrađen 1879.

details.name: North Dumpling Lighthouse
details.summary: North Dumpling Light is a lighthouse on North Dumpling Island in Long Island Sound off Fishers Island, New York, United States. It was constructed in 1849, rebuilt in 1871, and deactivated in 1959, with the aid to navigation being moved to an automated metal tower placed nearby.
La baliza de la isla Coelleira es una baliza situada en la isla Coelleira, en la comuna de Vicedo, en la provincia de Lugo, Galicia, España. Está gestionada por la autoridad portuaria de Ferrol.

details.name: La Farola del Mar
details.wikipedia: es:La farola del mar (Santa Cruz de Tenerife)
details.summary: La farola del mar, emplazada en Santa Cruz de Tenerife (Tenerife, Canarias, España), era uno de los dos faros de los que disponía el muelle Sur del Puerto de Santa Cruz de Tenerife.

details.name: North Ronaldsay Lighthouse
details.summary: North Ronaldsay Lighthouse was built in 1852 on the island of North Ronaldsay in the Orkney Islands, Scotland, 43 years after Dennis Head Old Beacon was deactivated. It lies at the north of the island at Point of Sinsoss , and boasts Britain's tallest land-based lighthouse tower.

details.name: Svjetionik Rt Crna Punta
details.summary: Svjetionik Rt Crna punta je svjetionik na jadranskoj obali, na istoimenom rtu na najistaknutijem dijelu istočne obale Istre. Nalazi se oko 1 km južno od sela Skitača u općini Raša.

details.name: Swallowtail Lighthouse
details.summary: The Swallowtail Lighthouse is a Canadian lighthouse located on Grand Manan Island in the Bay of Fundy. It was the first lighthouse to be built on the island.

details.name: Svjetionik Rt Verudica
details.summary: Svjetionik Rt Verudica je svjetionik na rtu Verudica, preko puta otoka Verude, južno od Pule. Okružen je šumom u turističkom naselju Punta Verudela.

details.name: Punta Mulas Light
details.summary: Punta Mulas Light, also known as Faro de Vieques, is a historic lighthouse located in the north shore of Vieques, an island-municipality of Puerto Rico. It was first lit in 1896 and automated in 1949.

details.name: Cabo Rojo Lighthouse
details.summary: Faro Los Morrillos de Cabo Rojo, also known as Los Morrillos Light, is a historic lighthouse located on the capes of Los Morrillos de Cabo Rojo in the municipality of Cabo Rojo, Puerto Rico.

details.name: Lighthouse Tarifa
details.summary: El faro de Punta de Tarifa es un faro de primer orden ubicado en Tarifa (Cádiz, España) y situado en el extremo sur de la Isla de Las Palomas.​
Hospital Point Range Front Light is a historic lighthouse at the end of Bayview Avenue in Beverly, Massachusetts. It forms the front half of a range which guides vessels toward Salem Harbor.

details.name: Vesborg Fyr
details.summary: Vesborg Fyr er et fyrtårn på Samsøs sydkyst, 2-3 km sydvest for Brattingsborg. Det blev opført i 1858 efter tegninger af N.S.

details.name: Long Point Light
details.summary: Long Point Light Station is a historic lighthouse at the northeast tip of Long Point in Provincetown, Massachusetts. As a navigational aid, it marks the southwest edge of the entrance to Provincetown Harbor.

details.name: Svjetionik Pomorac
details.summary: Le phare de Pomorac (en croate : Svjetionik Pomorac) est un feu actif situé sur le front de mer de Split, dans le Comitat de Split-Dalmatie en Croatie. Le phare est exploité par la société d'État Plovput .

details.name: Leuchtturm Wittdün
details.summary: Der Leuchtturm Wittdün oder auch Leitfeuer Wittdün war ein Leitfeuer an der deutschen Nordseeküste in Schleswig-Holstein.

details.name: Gorleston (Range Rear) Lighthouse
details.summary: Gorleston (Range Rear) Lighthouse is located near mouth of River Yare in the Gorleston-on-Sea area of Great Yarmouth in the English county of Norfolk. The lighthouse was built in 1887.

details.name: Holland Harbor Light
details.summary: The Holland Harbor Light, known as BIG RED, is located in Park Township, Michigan at the entrance of a channel connecting Lake Michigan with Lake Macatawa, and which gives access to the city of Holland, Michigan. The lighthouse is on the south side of the channel.

details.name: Svjetionik Rt Vošćica
details.summary: Svjetionik Rt Vošćica je svjetionik na rtu Vošćica, na sjevernom vrhu otoka Krka.

details.name: Kleiner Leuchtturm
details.summary: p4 Der Kleine Leuchtturm Borkum (auch: Elektrischer Leuchtturm) befindet sich auf einer zehn Meter hohen Düne an der Südwestseite Borkums und ist einer von drei Leuchttürmen auf Borkum. Er wurde 1888/1889 als Leitfeuer für die beiden Ansteuerungsfahrwasser der Ems, das Hubertgat…

details.name: Памятник "Маяк"
details.summary: Утришский маяк — маяк, расположенный на острове Утриш (Краснодарский край, Россия), на берегу Чёрного моря.

details.name: Phare de Lanvaon
details.summary: Le phare de Lanvaon a été mis en service en 1868, sur la commune de Plouguerneau, dans le Finistère. Il fut dessiné par l'ingénieur Alfred Cahen, qui dessina également les plans du viaduc de Morlaix[réf.

details.name: Gellen
details.summary: Der Leuchtturm Gellen ist ein Leuchtfeuer auf dem Gellen, dem südlichen Teil der Ostseeinsel Hiddensee. Der Leuchtturm wurde ab 1905 errichtet und dient bis heute als Quermarkenfeuer zur Orientierung für die Seefahrt auf dem Gellenstrom.

details.name: Sand Point Lighthouse
details.summary: The Sand Point Lighthouse is located in Escanaba, Michigan, United States, on Lake Michigan's northern shore. Since 1989, it has been an unofficial aid to navigation.

details.name: Svjetionik Pokonji Dol
details.summary: Svjetionik Otočić Pokonji dol je svjetionik na otočiću Pokonji Dol, jugoistočno od grada Hvara, pred uvalom Pokonji dol po kojoj i nosi ime. Sagrađen je krajem 19.

details.name: Faro de Torrox
details.summary: El faro de Torrox es un faro situado en la costa del término municipal de Torrox, en la provincia de Málaga (Andalucía, España).

details.name: Big Sodus Light
details.summary: Sodus Point Light is a historic lighthouse located in the village of Sodus Point in Wayne County, New York, marking the eastern entrance to Sodus Bay on Lake Ontario. The present limestone tower was constructed in 1870–1871 to replace an earlier 1825 light station and served as…

details.name: Engures bāka
details.summary: Der Leuchtturm Engure (lettisch Engures bāka) befindet sich in Engure (Angern) an der Mündung des Engure-Flusses in den Golf von Riga. Der Leuchtturm ist ein Stahlgitterturm mit rot-weißer Verlattung als Tagessichtmarke.

details.name: Farol de Pinda
details.summary: O Farol de Pinda, é um farol moçambicano localizado nas terras altas de Nangata, na ponta sul da Baía de Memba, a sudeste da cidade e distrito de Memba, na província de Nampula. Torre cilindrica em alvenaria, pintada com bandas pretas e brancas, com lanterna vermelha, com 31…

details.name: Leuchtturm Eckernförde

details.name: Faro di Capo Scaramia

details.summary: Le phare de la Madonetta se trouve à l'ouest de Bonifacio en Corse-du-Sud. Il balise l'entrée du goulet de Bonifacio par l'ouest face à la pointe du Timon, à l'est.

details.summary: The Kenosha North Pier Light, also known as the Kenosha North Pierhead Light, is a lighthouse located in Kenosha, Wisconsin. "A typical 'Lake Michigan red tower'", it is a sibling to the Milwaukee Pierhead Light.

details.name: Lorain West Breakwater Light
details.summary: The Lorain West Breakwater Light, also called the Lorain Harbor Light, is a lighthouse in Lorain, Ohio, United States. The light was built in 1917 on Lake Erie by the United States Army Corps of Engineers.

details.name: Kenosha Light
details.summary: Kenosha Light Station (also called Southport Light Station) is a lighthouse and keeper's house on Simmons Island north of the channel into Kenosha's harbor in Kenosha County, Wisconsin.

details.name: Halfmoon Reef Light

details.name: Miah Maull Shoal Light
details.summary: The Miah Maull Shoal Light is a lighthouse on the north side of the ship channel in Delaware Bay, off of Cumberland County, New Jersey on the East Coast of the United States, southwest of the mouth of the Maurice River.

details.name: Minnesota Point Light
details.summary: The Minnesota Point Light was a historic lighthouse on Minnesota Point in Duluth, Minnesota, United States, on the shores of Lake Superior. Built in 1858, it was the first lighthouse in the state, but is now a truncated ruined tower.

details.name: Martin Reef Lighthouse
details.summary: The Martin Reef Light Station is a lighthouse located in northern Lake Huron, 4.3 miles (6.9 km) south of Cadogan Point in Clark Township, Michigan. It was listed on the National Register of Historic Places in 2005.

details.name: Saginaw River Rear Range Light

details.name: Phare du Haut-fond Prince

details.name: Spit Bank Lighthouse

details.name: Phare d'Hammamet
details.summary: Le phare d'Hammammet est un phare situé sur le fort (kasbah) de la ville d'Hammamet (dépendant du gouvernorat de Nabeul en Tunisie). Les phares de Tunisie sont sous l'autorité du Service des phares et balises de la République tunisienne (SPHB).

details.name: Húsavíkurviti
details.summary: Le phare de Húsavík (en islandais : Húsavíkurviti) est un phare situé dans la ville de Húsavík, au nord de l'Islande.

details.name: Faro di Viareggio
details.summary: Il faro di Viareggio è un faro marittimo del mar Ligure che si trova alla foce del canale Burlamacca a Viareggio, presso l'infrastruttura portuale.

details.name: Barnegat Lighthouse
details.summary: Barnegat Lighthouse (or Barnegat Light, locally nicknamed Old Barney) is a historic lighthouse located in Barnegat Lighthouse State Park on the northern tip of Long Beach Island, in the borough of Barnegat Light, Ocean County, New Jersey, United States, on the south side of…

details.name: Taksensand Fyr
details.summary: Taksensand Fyr (staves også Taxensand Fyr) er et fyrtårn drevet af Farvandsvæsenet, beliggende for enden af vejen Stenkobbel i den sydlige del af Nørreskoven på østsiden af øen Als. Taksensand Fyr blev oprettet i 1905, da Sønderjylland var en del af Tyskland.

details.name: Duxbury Pier Light ("Bug Light")
details.summary: Duxbury Pier lighthouse also called Duxbury Light (nicknamed the "Bug Light") is a lighthouse located in Plymouth Harbor, Massachusetts. Duxbury Pier Light was built in 1871 on the north side of the main channel in Plymouth Harbor to mark the dangerous shoal off Saquish Head.

details.name: Wood End Light
details.summary: Wood End Light Lookout Station is a historic lighthouse, located at the southwest end of Long Point in Provincetown, Massachusetts. It is located at Wood End, near the southernmost extent of the Provincetown Spit, and acts as a navigational aid to vessels on their approach to…

details.name: Derby Wharf Light
details.summary: Derby Wharf Light Station is a historic lighthouse on Derby Wharf in Salem, Massachusetts that is within the Salem Maritime National Historic Site. It was built in 1871 and added to the National Register of Historic Places in 1987.

details.name: Cape Ann Light (Twin Lights)
details.summary: The Cape Ann Light Station on Thacher Island, off Cape Ann in Rockport, Massachusetts, is nationally significant as the last light station to be established under colonial rule and the first station in the United States to mark a navigational hazard rather than a harbor…

details.name: Cape Ann Light (Twin Lights)
details.summary: The Cape Ann Light Station on Thacher Island, off Cape Ann in Rockport, Massachusetts, is nationally significant as the last light station to be established under colonial rule and the first station in the United States to mark a navigational hazard rather than a harbor…

details.name: Ten Pound Island Light
details.summary: The Ten Pound Island Light is a historic lighthouse in Gloucester Harbor in Gloucester, Massachusetts. It is located on Ten Pound Island, near the eastern end of the harbor.

details.name: 1879 Hooper Straight Lighthouse
details.summary: Hooper Strait Light is one of four surviving Chesapeake Bay screw-pile lighthouses in the U.S. state of Maryland.

details.name: Phare du Cap-Ferret
details.summary: Le phare du cap Ferret est constitué d'une tour tronconique en maçonnerie lisse blanche et partie supérieure peinte en rouge, jouxtant un bâtiment rectangulaire abritant la salle des machines, la machinerie d'ascenseur et les logements. Construit en 1840, il est détruit en 1944…

details.name: Poplar Point Light
details.summary: Poplar Point Light (Lighthouse), built in 1831, is an historic lighthouse in North Kingstown, Rhode Island. It stands at the end of Poplar Point, marking the southern point of Wickford Harbor.

details.name: Blackistone Lighthouse
details.summary: The Blackistone Island Light was a lighthouse located on what is now St. Clement's Island on the Potomac River in Maryland.

details.name: Phare de Roscoff
details.summary: Le phare de Roscoff est un phare à terre construit en pleine ville de Roscoff, commune du Finistère.

details.name: Feu de Saint-Pol
details.summary: Le feu de Saint-Pol est un phare situé au bout de la jetée ouest du port de Dunkerque, inscrit aux monuments historiques. Propriété de l'État, il est envisagé de le céder aux collectivités locales.

details.name: Phare de Saint-Jean-de-Luz
details.summary: Donibane Lohizuneko itsasargia Lapurdiko Donibane Lohizune udalerrian dagoen itsasargi bat da. Donibane Lohizuneko porturako sarbidea adierazten du, Urdazuri ibaia Donibane Lohizuneko badian itsasoratzen den gunean dago, Ziburu udalerriarekin parez-pare.

details.name: Phare de Ciboure
details.summary: Le phare de Ciboure (feu amont) est un phare situé dans le port de Ciboure, dans le département des Pyrénées-Atlantiques. Il a été construit en 1936 sur des plans de l'architecte André Pavlovsky, avec son jumeau le phare de Saint-Jean-de-Luz Il donne un alignement de couleur…

details.name: Gap Rock Lighthouse
details.summary: 蚊尾洲燈塔（英語：Gap Rock Lighthouse）是位於中华人民共和国廣東省珠海市万山海洋开发试验区担杆镇佳蓬列島西南端蚊尾洲的燈塔，由港英政府與清政府共同興建、營運及維修，於1890年9月1日建造，於1892年啟用。有指「蚊」讀若璺。

details.name: Saint Marks Lighthouse
details.summary: The St. Marks Light is the second-oldest light station in Florida, United States.

details.name: Hríseyjarviti
details.summary: Hríseyjarrviti er viti í Hrísey við Eyjafjörð sem tekinn var í notkun þann 6. nóvember árið 1920.

details.name: Turkey Point Light
details.summary: The Turkey Point Light is a historic lighthouse at the head of the Chesapeake Bay. Although only a 35-foot (11 m) tower, the 100-foot (30 m) height of the bluffs on which it stands makes it the third highest light off the water in the bay.

details.name: Pilot Island Lighthouse
details.summary: The Pilot Island Light is a lighthouse located near Gills Rock, on Pilot Island at the east end of Death's Door passage, in Door County, Wisconsin. The building's design is similar to Pottawatomie Light on Rock Island (and many others), but is made of brick instead of stone.

details.name: Paradise Island Lighthouse
details.summary: p4 Paradise Island Lighthouse ist der älteste und bekannteste Leuchtturm (englisch Lighthouse) auf den Bahamas. Er steht auf Paradise Island und markiert die nordwestliche Einfahrt in den Hafen von Nassau.

details.name: Faro di Capo Granitola
details.summary: Capo Granitola Lighthouse (Italian: Faro di Capo Granitola) is an active lighthouse located on the south-western headland south of Mazzara del Vallo a region well known for its Almadraba. The tower is well placed in the nearby archeological park Cave di Cusa and is located in…

details.name: Devils Island South East Lighthouse
details.summary: The Devils Island Light is a Nova Scotia lighthouse located at the eastern shore entrance to Halifax Harbour on Devils Island, Nova Scotia. First lit in 1852, it was succeeded by a second lighthouse in 1877 which survives today.

details.name: Svjetionik Struga
details.summary: Svjetionik Rt Struga je svjetionik na vrhu strmih hridina na južnoj obali otoka Lastovo gdje istoimeni rt zatvara ulaz u Skrivenu Luku. Zajedno sa svjetionicima Glavat i Sušac služi za sigurnost plovidbe u Lastovskom kanalu, a vidljiv je do Palagruže.

details.name: Phare de Kerdonis
details.summary: Phare de Kerdonis ist der Name eines Leuchtturms auf der Insel Belle-Île, zur französischen Gemeinde Locmaria im Département Morbihan gehörend. Er hat eine Tragweite von 15 Seemeilen, ist nicht bewacht und kann nicht besichtigt werden.

details.name: Phare de la Pointe de Grave
details.summary: Le phare de Grave, sur la pointe de Grave, est situé sur le côté sud de l'embouchure de l'estuaire de la Gironde, commune du Verdon-sur-Mer. Le musée du phare de Cordouan et des Phares et Balises se trouve dans les locaux jouxtant la tour.

El Faro del Puerto de Les Saintes​ (en francés: Phare du Port des Saintes) es una estructura que se localiza en la isla de Terre-de-Haut en Guadalupe, que forma con la isla de Terre-de-Bas y otros islotes las islas de Les Saintes, al sur de Basse-Terre y al oeste de…

details.name: Elie Ness Lighthouse
details.summary: Maják Elie Ness byl postaven na mysu Elie Ness poblíž Elie a Earlsferry na severní straně ústí zálivu Firth of Forth ve správní oblasti Fife v jihovýchodním Skotsku. Spolu s majáky na ostrovech Isle of May a Fidra zajišťuje bezpečnou plavbu lodí v zálivu Firth of Forth.

details.name: Lydia Ann Lighthouse
details.summary: Aransas Pass Light Station also called Lydia Ann Lighthouse is an historic light station in Aransas County, Harbor Island, just outside the city limits of Port Aransas, Texas, behind San Jose and Mustang Islands, that protects a natural gulf pass to Aransas and Corpus Christi…

details.name: 球子山燈塔
details.summary: 球子山燈塔，是一座位於台灣基隆市球子山的燈塔，興建於1956年，並於1991年後暫停使用。該燈塔塔身主體原為白色，後以國防色（綠色）為主。

details.name: 部埼灯台
details.summary: Hesaki Lighthouse (部埼灯台, hesaki tōdai) is a lighthouse on the Kiku Peninsula in Moji-ku, Kitakyūshū in Fukuoka Prefecture, Japan. It was constructed in December 1870; the lighthouse was lit on 22 January 1871.

details.name: Roker Pier Lighthouse
details.summary: Roker ( ROH-kər) is a seaside resort in Sunderland, city of Sunderland district, Tyne and Wear. England.

details.summary: The Tinicum Island Rear Range Light is a lighthouse located in the Billingsport section of Paulsboro in Gloucester County, New Jersey, the rear of a pair of range lights marking a section of the channel in the Delaware River south of Philadelphia. The lighthouse is surrounded by…

details.name: Akaroa Lighthouse
details.summary: p4 Akaroa Lighthouse ist ein Leuchtturm in Akaroa auf der Banks Peninsula in der Region Canterbury auf der Südinsel Neuseelands. Er befindet sich heute in der Beach Road in Akaroa.

details.name: Far de la Banya
details.summary: El Far de la Banya és una obra de Tarragona protegida com a Bé Cultural d'Interès Local.

details.name: Lazaretto Cairn Lighthouse
details.summary: Lazaretto Cairn Lighthouse guides vessels westward on their approach to Kingston Harbour. It appears to be a historic daybeacon converted to a lighted aid.

details.name: Hilton Head Range Rear Light
details.summary: The Rear Lighthouse of Hilton Head Range Light Station, which is also called Leamington Lighthouse is an inactive light station on Hilton Head Island in Beaufort County, South Carolina. In 1983, it was named to the National Register of Historic Places.

details.name: Bray's Point Lighthouse
details.summary: The Rockwell Light is located on the northern harbor area of Oshkosh, Wisconsin, in Winnebago County, Wisconsin.

details.name: Holland Island Bar Light
details.summary: The Holland Island Bar Light was a screw-pile lighthouse in the Chesapeake Bay which existed from 1889 to 1960. It is remembered for the unexplained death of one of its keepers, and for being "attacked" by United States Navy pilots during a training exercise.

details.name: Brík
details.summary: Le phare de Brík est un phare situé dans la région de Norðurland vestra. Il marque l'entrée occidentale des fjords Ólafsfjörður et Eyjafjörður.

details.name: North Brother Island Light
details.summary: North Brother Island Light was a lighthouse located on North Brother Island in the East River in New York City. The lighthouse was at the southern tip of the island.

details.name: Gibraltar Point Lighthouse
details.summary: The Gibraltar Point Lighthouse is a lighthouse located on Hanlan's Point, the most westerly of the Toronto Islands in Toronto, Ontario, Canada. Begun in 1808, it is the oldest existing lighthouse on the Great Lakes, and one of Toronto's oldest buildings.

details.name: Upper Grassy Island Range Light
details.summary: The Grassy Island Range Lights are a pair of lighthouses originally established to guide traffic through the channel into the harbor at Green Bay, Wisconsin, United States. They were deactivated and moved ashore as part of a channel-widening project.

details.name: Lower Grassy Island Range Light
details.summary: The Grassy Island Range Lights are a pair of lighthouses originally established to guide traffic through the channel into the harbor at Green Bay, Wisconsin, United States. They were deactivated and moved ashore as part of a channel-widening project.

details.name: Browns Head Light
details.summary: Browns Head Light is a lighthouse in Vinalhaven, Maine. Established in 1832, it is an active aid to navigation, marking the southern side of the western entrance to the Fox Island Thoroughfare, a busy strait separating Vinalhaven Island from North Haven.

details.name: 伊王島灯台

details.name: Sullivan's Island Lighthouse
details.summary: Charleston Light, also known as Sullivan's Island Lighthouse, is located on Sullivan's Island, South Carolina, which is the northern entrance to Charleston Harbor. Designed by Thomas Sullivan, the lighthouse was erected to replace the defunct Morris Island Light on Morris…

details.name: Haszard Point Range Front
details.summary: The Haszard Point Range Front is one of two range lights, the front light and the rear light, on Prince Edward Island, Canada. They were built in 1889, and are still active.

details.name: Noup Head Lighthouse
details.summary: Noup Head Lighthouse lies on the north west headland of the isle of Westray, in Orkney, Scotland. It was constructed by David A Stevenson in 1898 for the Northern Lighthouse Board.

details.summary: The Old Presque Isle Light was the first lighthouse in the Presque Isle, Michigan, area, built in 1840, supported physically by two-thirds stone and one-third brick, and supported financially by funds appropriated by Congress two years earlier of $5,000. The tower and dwelling…

details.name: Tistlarna fyr
details.summary: Le phare de Tistlarna (en suédois : Tistlarnas fyr) est un feu situé sur l'île de Tistlarna au sud de l'Archipel de Göteborg, appartenant à la commune de Göteborg, dans le Comté de Västra Götaland (Suède).

details.name: Patara Lighthouse

details.name: Old Point Comfort Lighthouse
details.summary: Old Point Comfort Light is a lighthouse located on the grounds of Fort Monroe in the Virginia portion of the Chesapeake Bay. It is the second oldest light in the bay and the oldest still in use.

details.name: Qimei Lighthouse
details.summary: The Qimei Lighthouse / Cimei Lighthouse (traditional Chinese: 七美嶼燈塔; simplified Chinese: 七美屿灯塔; Hanyu Pinyin: Qīměi Yǔ Dēngtǎ; Tongyong Pinyin: Ciměi Yǔ Dengtǎ) is a lighthouse in Qimei / Cimei Township, Penghu County, Taiwan.

details.name: Farol de Galinhos
details.summary: O Farol de Galinhos é um farol localizado na praia ao norte de Galinhos, no estado do Rio Grande do Norte, no Brasil. Foi construído em 1931.
Nyhamnin majakka on käytöstä poistettu majakka Ahvenanmaalla Lemlandissa Lilla Båtskärin saarella. Majakka oli entisessä kaivostornissa ja se valmistui 1958, sen valon korkeus oli 43,0 metriä.

details.name: Anholt Fyr
details.summary: Anholt Fyr er et af landets første fyr beliggende i Ørkenen ved den nordøstlige ende af øen Anholt i Kattegat. Det første fyr blev bygget som vippefyr allerede i 1561, sammen med Skagen Fyr.

details.name: Pointe aux Barques Lighthouse
details.summary: Pointe aux Barques ( point-ə-BARKS) Lighthouse and Maritime Museum is an active lighthouse and adjoining museum located in Huron County in the U.S. state of Michigan.

details.name: Phare de Pertusato
details.summary: Le phare de Pertusato domine le cap de Pertusato à 4 km au sud-est de Bonifacio en Corse-du-Sud. Il balise la côte sud de la Corse et l'entrée du port de Bonifacio.

details.name: Whitefish Point Lighthouse
details.summary: The Whitefish Point Light is a lighthouse located in Chippewa County in the U.S. state of Michigan.

details.name: Pansion lentomajakka
details.summary: Pansion lentomajakka on Turussa Pansion kaupunginosassa sijaitseva lentomajakka. Lentomajakka sijaitsee entisen Artukaisten lentokentän läheisyydessä.

details.name: Belyea's Point Light
details.summary: Belyea's Point Lighthouse is an 11-metre (36 ft)-tall landfall lighthouse located along the Saint John River, near the community of Morrisdale. It was built in 1881, commenced operation on June 1, 1882, with Spafford Barker Belyea serving as its first keeper and later rebuilt at…

details.name: Farol do Forte da Barra
details.summary: Le phare du Fort de Barra de Aveiro est un phare situé dans la freguesia de Gafanha da Nazaré de la ville d'Ílhavo, dans le district d'Aveiro (Région Centre du Portugal). Il est géré par l'autorité maritime nationale du Portugal à Oeiras (Grand Lisbonne).

details.name: Grand Marais Lighthouse

details.name: Møns Fyr
details.summary: Møn Fyr er et anduvningfyr, beliggende på Møns syd-østlige-pynt. Fyret blev bygget i 1845 og det var fra starten forsynet med fast linseapparat.

details.name: Timmendorf
details.summary: Der Leuchtturm Timmendorf-Poel ist ein Leuchtturm an der Ostsee in Mecklenburg-Vorpommern. Er befindet sich am südwestlichen Ende der Insel Poel in der Nähe des Ortes Timmendorf, am kleinen Hafen im Ortsteil Timmendorf Strand.

details.name: Svjetionik Rt Oštro
details.summary: Svjetionik Rt Oštro – Kraljevica je svjetionik na malom poluotoku na jugoistočnoj strani ulaza u Bakarski zaljev. Izgrađen je 1872.

details.name: Pipe Island Lighthouse
details.summary: Pipe Island Light is a privately owned lighthouse on Pipe Island in St. Mary's River, Michigan.

details.name: Simpnäsklubb
details.summary: Simpnäsklubb är en holme och en fyrplats (Simpnäsklubb 1:1) en sjömil norr om Simpnäs på Väddö i Stockholms skärgård. Under 1760-talet uppfördes känningsbåkar av sten på Arholma, Simpnäsklubb (ön även kallad Skomakaren) och Högskär i Stockholms norra skärgård.

details.name: Östra Stendörren
details.summary: Östra Stendörren är en fyr som står 300 meter öster om ön Stendörren i Haninge kommun. Det har funnits fyr på den här platsen sedan 1882.

details.name: Stenkobbsgrund
details.summary: Stenkobbsgrund är en fyr i Stockholms mellersta skärgård, belägen strax ost om Ramsmora på Möja, i Kudoxaleden från Arholma till Kanholmsfjärden. Fyren är vitmålad med ett grönt band och avger två blixtar var sjätte sekund i sektorerna vitt, rött och grönt.

details.name: Ekören
details.summary: Ekören är en ö och en sektorfyr i Lerviksleden norr om Mjölkö i Stockholms skärgård. Fyren byggdes 1913 och är sedan 1986 självförsörjande med energi tack vare solpaneler.

details.name: Lerviksudde
details.summary: Alang sa ubang mga dapit sa mao gihapon nga ngalan, tan-awa ang Lerviksudden. Punta ang Lerviksudden sa Sweden.

details.name: Växlet norra
details.summary: Växlets fyrar är två ledfyrar, Växlet norra och Växlet södra, i Furusundsleden i Stockholms skärgård. De är belägna utanför Bergsholmen mellan Väringsö och Yxlan, Växlet södra omkring 250 meter sydost om Växlet norra.

details.name: Växlet södra
details.summary: Växlets fyrar är två ledfyrar, Växlet norra och Växlet södra, i Furusundsleden i Stockholms skärgård. De är belägna utanför Bergsholmen mellan Väringsö och Yxlan, Växlet södra omkring 250 meter sydost om Växlet norra.

details.name: Franska Stenarna
details.summary: Franska Stenarna ett grund i Nämdöfjärden i Stockholms skärgård, cirka två sjömil söder om Stavsnäs. Den ligger i Värmdö socken och kommun samt i landskapet Uppland.

details.name: Fjärdhällan
details.summary: Fjärdhällan är en obemannad ledfyr utmed Landsortsleden i Stockholms skärgård, knappt fem sjömil nordöst om Dalarö. Den ligger i Dalarö socken i Haninge kommun och i landskapet Södermanland.

details.name: Tegelhällan
details.summary: Tegelhällan är en fyr som står några hundra meter från land utanför Stavsnäs vinterhamn i Värmdö kommun. Fram till 1976 var fyren atomdriven, driven av en radioisotopgenerator laddad med Strontium-90.

details.name: Landsorts Bredgrund
details.summary: Le phare de Landsorts Bredgrund (en suédois : Landsorts Bredgrund) est un feu en mer situé devant le phare de Landsort appartenant à la commune de Nynäshamn, dans le Comté de Stockholm (Suède).

Le phare de Naufrage (en anglais : Naufrage Lighthouse ou Shipwreck Point Lighthouse) est un phare actif qui est situé au port de Naufrage, dans le Comté de Kings (Province de l'Île-du-Prince-Édouard), au Canada. Ce phare est géré par la Garde côtière canadienne.
Le phare de Pencarrow est un phare de secteur situé sur Pencarrow Head (en), dans la région de Wellignton (île du Nord), en Nouvelle-Zélande. Il se trouve sous l'ancien phare de Pencarrow Head.

details.name: Taiaroa Head Lighthouse
details.summary: Le phare de Taiaroa Head est un phare situé sur la péninsule d'Otago (région d'Otago - île du Sud), en Nouvelle-Zélande.

details.name: Kaipara North Head Lighthouse
details.summary: Le phare de Kaipara North Head est un ancien phare situé sur le Cape Brett (en), dans le District de Kaipara (Northland - île du Nord), en Nouvelle-Zélande.

details.name: Ballebro Fyr
details.summary: Ballebro Fyr er et 6 meter højt fyr ved Als Fjord, 250 m sydøst for Ballebro. Fyret er opført i 1904 i perioden hvor Sønderjylland var en del af Tyskland.
Skanörs fyr är belägen på hamnpiren i Skanör, Vellinge kommun, Skåne län. Fyren tillkom år 1881, för att underlätta seglationen för det nya bolaget Skånska Kustens ångbåtar.

details.name: Troubridge Island Lighthouse
